name: Clams Casino No. 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Open clams and discard the top shell.
3. Place clams in a shallow baking pan.
4. In a saucepan, melt 4 tbsp butter and sauté garlic and green pepper for 2-3 minutes.
5. Add remaining butter, lemon juice, and bread crumbs, mixing thoroughly.
6. Place 1 teaspoon of the mixture on top of each clam.
7. Bake for 10 minutes.
